calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2016 Off Calendar

Amended Motion For Default Profe-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-12-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Daniel Bornstein, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff The 1335 Filbert Street Homeowners
Association,
No appearance by defaulted defendant Paul De Martini,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-20 dismissed without prejudice.
Witness, Patricia Bourne and John Hagar, sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.

Plantiff's Exhibits:
1-Declaration of Patricia Bourne
2-Declaration of John Hagar
3-CC&R's
Court returned all exhibits to Plaintiff.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against
Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $1,100,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $105,780.82
Attorney's Fees: $53,130.00
Costs: $407.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $1,259,317.82
Court Granted Permanent Injunction against Defendant Paul De Martini.

Judgment signed in open court.

Plaintiffs Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-26-2016 Off Calendar
